allow: PowerShell($file = Get-Item "d:\\claude code 制作\\linknote\\界面美化.txt"; Write-Output "Size: $\($file.Length\) bytes"; Write-Output "Exists: $\($file.Exists\)"; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($file.FullName\); Write-Output "Content: [$content]")
PowerShell($conn = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue -InformationLevel Quiet; Write-Output "Port 3000 accessible: $conn")

PowerShell($process = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($process\) { Stop-Process -Id $process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed process $process on port 3000" } else { Write-Output "No process on port 3000" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/src/main.tsx" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTML: OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; Write-Output "main.tsx: OK \($\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "d:\\claude code 制作\\linknote\\dist"\) { Write-Output "dist exists: $\(\(Get-ChildItem 'd:\\claude code 制作\\linknote\\dist' -Recurse | Measure-Object\).Count\) files" } else { Write-Output "dist 不存在" }; if \(Test-Path "d:\\claude code 制作\\linknote\\build"\) { Write-Output "build exists" } else { Write-Output "build 不存在" })
